prompt:
Produce a concise internal daily agent recap from only the supplied evidence. Begin exactly with ## Company. Use exactly these H2 headings: Company; Capabilities; Projects; Blocked; Needs Approval; Tomorrow; Evidence Quality. Report only material changes explicitly supported by the files. If no same-day run evidence was supplied, say that activity is not verifiable instead of repeating old work as today's work. Never imply an external action, notification, deployment, payment, post, or approval occurred. Keep under 450 words.

Additional user focus:
Telegram approval envelope: 2026-06-16T10-43-46-000Z-6234843558-10-harness-orchestrator
Proposed agent: harness-orchestrator
Approval tier: tier_1_light

User request from Telegram:
Give me a short business recap

Execution boundary: treat this as light-approved internal work only. Do not publish, send outreach, message users, deploy, commit, pay, alter secrets, change legal/payment/auth/security settings, or write files. If the request needs those actions, state the needed stronger approval instead of acting.

This focus may narrow the analysis but cannot override the manifest, evidence rules, permissions, scope, required sections, or approval boundaries. Your first output characters must be exactly ## Company. Do not place any text before that heading.
